reviews.comment: She is such a nice teacher! She's funny and is so enthusiastic about math. She tries to be fair about attendance. She's not always clear about what your going over. I already knew most of the material but she still confused me sometimes. Overall, she is amazing and I'm glad I had her.
Super nice, brings us candy and sweets on Fridays!

Not quite a professor in the usual sense, but this shouldn't worry you.  An incredibly patient and helpful teacher, I couldn't have made it through the class without her.  Helped me more times than I can count and was very good at dealing with frustrated students.  Knew her subject very well.
